item.title: Al-Monitor | Scared and angry British Jews demand more from government after knife attack
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 12:36 UTC ————————————————

By Marissa Davison and Ben Makori

LONDON, April 30 (Reuters) - Scared, angry at the government, and wondering whether they need to leave the country, British Jews in the north London suburb of Golders Green were reeling a day after an attacker stabbed two men in the street.

Members of the Jewish community said they were looking for Prime… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/scared-and-angry-british-jews-demand-more-government-after-knife-attack

item.title: Al-Monitor | Germany's Merz stresses commitment to transatlantic partnership
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 12:36 UTC ————————————————

MUNSTER, Germany, April 30 (Reuters) - German Chancellor Friedrich Merz emphasized on Thursday the importance of the transatlantic partnership with the U.S., just hours after President Donald Trump said his administration was looking at reducing the number of U.S. troops in Germany.

Speaking to reporters at a military base, Merz said Germany's… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/germanys-merz-stresses-commitment-transatlantic-partnership

item.title: Al-Monitor | Italy condemns 'unlawful' Israeli interception of Gaza aid flotilla
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 12:01 UTC ————————————————

ROME, April 30 (Reuters) - Italy condemns Israel's seizure of aid ships bound for Gaza and demands the immediate release of all Italians who have been "unlawfully detained," Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni's office said on Thursday.

Israel intercepted the vessels in international waters near Greece late on Wednesday, a move the organizers -- Global… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/italy-condemns-unlawful-israeli-interception-gaza-aid-flotilla

item.title: Al-Monitor | Iranian economic collapse may come too late for Trump
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 12:01 UTC ————————————————

By Parisa Hafezi and Angus McDowall

DUBAI, April 30 - Weeks of conflict have aggravated Iran's dire economic problems, risking calamity after the war, but the Islamic Republic looks able to survive a standoff in the Gulf for now, despite a U.S. blockade that has cut off energy exports.

With major fighting paused by an April 8 truce, Iran is… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/iranian-economic-collapse-may-come-too-late-trump

item.title: Al-Monitor | Israeli military tells residents of eight Lebanese towns outside 'buffer zone' to leave ahead of strikes
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 11:01 UTC ————————————————

BEIRUT, April 30 (Reuters) - The Israeli military warned residents of eight Lebanese towns outside of the "buffer zone" to leave their homes immediately on Thursday ahead of strikes.

The "buffer zone" in southern Lebanon was occupied by Israeli troops before a ceasefire that was announced earlier this month but has failed to fully halt… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/israeli-military-tells-residents-eight-lebanese-towns-outside-buffer-zone-leave

item.title: Al-Monitor | Tunisia opposition leader Ghannouchi hospitalised after health deteriorates, party says
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 11:01 UTC ————————————————

April 30 (Reuters) - Imprisoned Tunisian opposition leader Rached Ghannouchi has suffered a sharp deterioration in his health and has been urgently transferred from prison to hospital, his Ennahda party said on Thursday.

Ghannouchi, 84, a fierce critic of President Kais Saied and a dominant figure in Tunisian politics since the country's 2011… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/tunisia-opposition-leader-ghannouchi-hospitalised-after-health-deteriorates-party

item.title: Al-Monitor | Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei says new management of Strait of Hormuz 'will bring calm'
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 11:01 UTC ————————————————

April 30 (Reuters) - Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei said in a published written message on Thursday that a new chapter for the Gulf and Strait of Hormuz has been taking shape since the Iran war with the United States and Israel broke out on February 28.

Iran's Supreme Leader said that Tehran would secure the Gulf region and eliminate… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/irans-supreme-leader-mojtaba-khamenei-says-new-management-strait-hormuz-will

item.title: Al-Monitor | Japan's PM vows all diplomatic efforts to ensure passage of vessels through Hormuz
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 11:01 UTC ————————————————

TOKYO, April 30 (Reuters) - Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said on Thursday that she will continue all diplomatic efforts to ensure the passage of all vessels though the Strait of Hormuz.

Takaichi made the comment after phone talks with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian.

Takaichi said that in the process of ensuring the safe passage… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/japans-pm-vows-all-diplomatic-efforts-ensure-passage-vessels-through-hormuz

item.title: Al-Monitor | Gaza flotilla organisers say 211 activists 'kidnapped' by Israel
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 11:00 UTC ————————————————

Organisers of a Gaza-bound aid flotilla on Thursday said Israel's army had "kidnapped" 211 activists including a Paris city councillor in a raid in international waters off Greece.

Helene Coron, a spokeswoman for the Global Sumud France, told an online news conference that the operation had taken place near the Greek island of Crete, at an… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/gaza-flotilla-organisers-say-211-activists-kidnapped-israel

item.title: Al-Monitor | Some 287 nominated for 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, Trump likely among them
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:36 UTC ————————————————

By Gwladys Fouche and Nerijus Adomaitis

OSLO, April 30 (Reuters) - Some 287 candidates will be considered for the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, the secretary of the Norwegian Nobel Committee said on Thursday, with U.S. President Donald Trump likely to be among the nominees.

Of this year's nominations, 208 are individuals and 79 are organisations,… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/some-287-nominated-2026-nobel-peace-prize-trump-likely-among-them

item.title: Al-Monitor | Lithuania should join US coalition in Strait of Hormuz, president says
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:36 UTC ————————————————

VILNIUS, April 30 (Reuters) - Lithuania's President Gitanas Nauseda said he was supportive of his country joining the U.S. freedom of navigation mission in the Strait of Hormuz, adding that he would present the proposal to the Baltic state's defence council.

The United States is pushing for other countries to help restore freedom of navigation in… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/lithuania-should-join-us-coalition-strait-hormuz-president-says

item.title: Al-Monitor | Iran's North American diaspora split over next steps after Trump's ceasefire
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:36 UTC ————————————————

By Wa Lone

TORONTO, April 30 (Reuters) - With fighting between the United States, Israel and Iran at a fragile standstill, Iran's large North American diaspora is divided over what should come next.

Demonstrators at a rally in Toronto on Sunday said they hope U.S. President Donald Trump will continue with military intervention aimed at regime… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/irans-north-american-diaspora-split-over-next-steps-after-trumps-ceasefire

item.title: Al-Monitor | US seeks international help to reopen Strait of Hormuz as crude prices surge
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:36 UTC ————————————————

By Humeyra Pamuk

WASHINGTON/DUBAI/ISLAMABAD, April 29 (Reuters) - The United States is pressing ahead with plans for an international coalition to open the Strait of Hormuz, according to a State Department cable seen by Reuters, as oil prices surge on fears of lengthy disruptions to global fuel supplies.

Two months into the war that started… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/us-seeks-international-help-reopen-strait-hormuz-crude-prices-surge

item.title: Al-Monitor | Rats infest Gaza's tent camps, biting children and spreading disease
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:01 UTC ————————————————

By Nidal al-Mughrabi and Haseeb Alwazeer

CAIRO/GAZA, April 30 (Reuters) - Rats and parasites are spreading through Gaza's tent camps for displaced Palestinians, biting children's fingers and toes as they sleep, gnawing through people's few remaining treasured possessions, and spreading disease.

The outbreak is unfolding as most of Gaza's… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/rats-infest-gazas-tent-camps-biting-children-and-spreading-disease

item.title: Al-Monitor | Under-fire UK boosts security for Jews after latest attack
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 10:00 UTC ————————————————

The UK government on Thursday announced extra money for security patrols outside synagogues and schools as community leaders accused it of failing to protect them, a day after the latest attack targeting the Jewish community.

Two men were knifed in the street in broad daylight on Wednesday in Golders Green, an area of north London with a large… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/under-fire-uk-boosts-security-jews-after-latest-attack

item.title: Al-Monitor | Vessel carrying grain Ukraine says was stolen will not unload in Israel, Kyiv says
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 09:36 UTC ————————————————

April 30 (Reuters) - Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha said that a vessel carrying grain that Kyiv says was stolen from its territories occupied by Russia would not unload its cargo in Israel, describing it as a "welcome development" on Thursday.

Ukraine has asked Israel to seize the vessel, amid a diplomatic tussle between the two countries… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/vessel-carrying-grain-ukraine-says-was-stolen-will-not-unload-israel-kyiv-says

item.title: Middle East Eye | By failing to sanction Israel, the EU has confirmed once again its global irrelevance

item.title: Al-Monitor | China conducts combat readiness patrols in Scarborough Shoal
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 08:36 UTC ————————————————

BEIJING, April 30 (Reuters) - China's military said on Thursday its naval and air forces conducted combat readiness patrols in the Scarborough Shoal and surrounding areas in the disputed South China Sea.

"Such patrols serve as an effective countermeasure to cope with all sorts of rights-violation and provocative acts. They are meant to resolutely… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/china-conducts-combat-readiness-patrols-scarborough-shoal

item.title: Al-Monitor | Iran's supreme leader defies US blockade as oil prices soar
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 08:30 UTC ————————————————

Iran's supreme leader declared Thursday that the United States had suffered a shameful defeat, defiantly rejecting a warning from President Donald Trump that an economically-punishing US naval blockade could be enforced for months to come.

Oil prices hit a four-year high then fell back slightly, before Mojtaba Khamenei issued a written statement… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/irans-supreme-leader-defies-us-blockade-oil-prices-soar

item.title: Al-Monitor | From surplus to strain: world rice supply threatened by Iran war, El Nino
item.description:
Al-Monitor • Apr 30, 2026 08:02 UTC ————————————————

By Naveen Thukral and Panarat Thepgumpanat

SINGAPORE/BANGKOK, April 30 (Reuters) - Rice supply is expected to fall this year as farmers cut planting acreage across Asia because of fertiliser shortages and soaring fuel costs from the Iran war, with an emerging El Nino also set to squeeze output of the world's most consumed staple.

———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/04/surplus-strain-world-rice-supply-threatened-iran-war-el-nino
